member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Common.Data.DapperTypeHandlers
member.summary: Dapper type handlers for custom types.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Common.Data.DapperTypeHandlers.Register
member.summary: Registers all custom type handlers with Dapper.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Common.Data.DateTimeOffsetHandler
member.summary: Type handler for DateTimeOffset to handle PostgreSQL timestamptz.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Common.Data.GuidHandler
member.summary: Type handler for Guid to ensure proper handling.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Common.Extensions.ApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseExceptionHandling(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds the exception handling middleware to the pipeline.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Common.Extensions.ResultExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for converting Result types to HTTP responses using ProblemDetails.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Common.Extensions.ResultExtensions.ToProblemResult(PqcIdentity.SharedKernel.Results.Result)
member.summary: Converts a Result to an appropriate IResult for minimal API responses.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Common.Extensions.ResultExtensions.ToProblemResult``1(PqcIdentity.SharedKernel.Results.Result{``0})
member.summary: Converts a Result<T> to an appropriate IResult for minimal API responses.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Common.Extensions.ResultExtensions.ToProblemResult``1(PqcIdentity.SharedKernel.Results.Result{``0},System.Func{``0,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IResult})
member.summary: Converts a Result<T> to an appropriate IResult with a custom success result factory.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Common.Extensions.ResultExtensions.ToProblemResult(PqcIdentity.SharedKernel.Results.ValidationResult)
member.summary: Converts a ValidationResult to an appropriate IResult with validation problem details.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Common.Extensions.ResultExtensions.ToProblemResult``1(PqcIdentity.SharedKernel.Results.ValidationResult{``0})
member.summary: Converts a ValidationResult<T> to an appropriate IResult with validation problem details.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Common.Extensions.ResultExtensions.ToProblemResult(PqcIdentity.SharedKernel.Results.Error)
member.summary: Converts an Error to an appropriate IResult using ProblemDetails.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Common.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddDatabase(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Adds the database connection factory with the specified connection string.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Common.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware
member.summary: Global exception handling middleware that returns ProblemDetails responses.
